verified_title: Secretion of cyclolysin, the calmodulin-sensitive adenylate cyclase-haemolysin bifunctional protein of Bordetella pertussis.
note: Glaser 1988 EMBO J; shows CyaA secretion requires cyaB/cyaD/cyaE (HlyBD-like) T1SS. Same paper as hint.

verified_title: Legionella pneumophila secretes an endoglucanase that belongs to the family-5 of glycosyl hydrolases and is dependent upon type II secretion.
note: Pearce & Cianciotto 2009 FEMS Microbiol Lett: CelA endoglucanase abolished in lspF mutant = direct T2S substrate. Stronger than hint DebRoy 2006 secretome (PNAS 10.1073/pnas.0608279103), which does not name CelA. Chose CelA-specific primary.

verified_title: Evidence for the secretion of Chlamydia trachomatis CopN by a type III secretion mechanism.
note: Fields & Hackstadt 2000 Mol Microbiol: original demonstration CopN secreted by T3SS (pYV/Ca2+-dependent in Yersinia). Hint (Archuleta 2011 JBC 10.1074/jbc.M111.258426) is a CopN structure paper, not the secretion primary.

verified_title: The Citrobacter rodentium genome sequence reveals convergent evolution with human pathogenic Escherichia coli.
note: Petty 2010 J Bacteriol genome/effector-repertoire paper (intended answer-key anchor; dead DOI repaired to working one). Genome-level, not per-effector translocation assay.

verified_title: The Citrobacter rodentium genome sequence reveals convergent evolution with human pathogenic Escherichia coli.
note: Petty 2010 genome paper; LEE effector repertoire of C. rodentium ICC168. Same anchor as hint; repaired dead DOI.

verified_title: Proteomic and functional analysis of the suite of Ysp proteins exported by the Ysa type III secretion system of Yersinia enterocolitica Biovar 1B.
note: Matsumoto & Young 2006 Mol Microbiol: YspE among Ysps translocated by Ysa T3SS (Ysp-CyaA chimera assay). Same paper as hint.

verified_title: The Citrobacter rodentium genome sequence reveals convergent evolution with human pathogenic Escherichia coli.
note: Petty 2010 genome paper; duplicate of R082 (EspA, ROD_30191). Same anchor as hint; repaired dead DOI.

verified_title: The Citrobacter rodentium genome sequence reveals convergent evolution with human pathogenic Escherichia coli.
note: Petty 2010 genome paper; duplicate of R084 (EspZ, ROD_30281). Same anchor as hint.

verified_title: The Citrobacter rodentium genome sequence reveals convergent evolution with human pathogenic Escherichia coli.
note: Petty 2010 genome paper; Map is a core LEE effector in C. rodentium repertoire. Same anchor as hint.

verified_title: Recognition of the Agrobacterium tumefaciens VirE2 translocation signal by the VirB/D4 transport system does not require VirE1.
note: Vergunst 2003 Plant Physiol: C-terminal 50 aa of VirE3 sufficient for VirB/D4-dependent Cre (CRAFT) translocation into host cells. Hint DOI 10.1073/pnas.0500396102 (Vergunst 2005 PNAS) does NOT resolve in Crossref or EuropePMC = nonexistent/wrong.

verified_title: A bipartite signal mediates the transfer of type IV secretion substrates of Bartonella henselae into human cells.
note: Schulein 2005 PNAS: identifies Beps A-G (incl. BepD) translocated into human cells by B. henselae VirB/VirD4 T4SS. Same paper as hint.

verified_title: Diverse type VI secretion phospholipases are functionally plastic antibacterial effectors.
note: Russell 2013 Nature: defines Tle (type VI lipase effector) superfamily; PldA/Tle delivered by P. aeruginosa H2-T6SS. Same paper as hint.

verified_title: Diverse type VI secretion phospholipases are functionally plastic antibacterial effectors.
note: Russell 2013 Nature: Tle phospholipase superfamily incl. Tle4 (PA1510) as H2-T6SS antibacterial effector. Same paper as hint.

verified_title: The Pseudomonas aeruginosa Type VI Secretion PGAP1-like Effector Induces Host Autophagy by Activating Endoplasmic Reticulum Stress.
note: Jiang 2016 Cell Reports: TplE (PA1510, PGAP1-like) is an H2-T6SS effector. Same paper as hint; verdict's old DOI .020 was wrong-topic.

verified_title: Diverse type VI secretion phospholipases are functionally plastic antibacterial effectors.
note: Russell 2013 Nature: Tle-lipase superfamily covering B. thailandensis Tle1 (BTH_I2698). Hint-named Tle-lipase primary; replaces mis-cited Tae amidase paper.

verified_title: Type VI Secretion System Transports Zn2+ to Combat Multiple Stresses and Host Immunity.
note: Wang 2015 PLoS Pathog: YezP (YPK_3549) is a Zn-binding substrate translocated by Y. pseudotuberculosis T6SS-4. Same paper as hint.

verified_title: A widespread bacterial type VI secretion effector superfamily identified using a heuristic approach.
note: Russell 2012 Cell Host Microbe: Tae amidase effector superfamily incl. Salmonella Tae4 (SPI-6). Same paper as hint.

verified_title: A phospholipase A1 antibacterial Type VI secretion effector interacts directly with the C-terminal domain of the VgrG spike protein for delivery.
note: Flaugnatti 2016 Mol Microbiol: Tle1 (PLA1) of E. coli Sci-1 T6SS, VgrG-dependent delivery. Same paper as hint.
